title: C-Corp Shareholder Agreement
description: Governs C-Corporation shares, investor voting rights, board compositions, and drag-along / tag-along privileges.
whatsCovered: Preemptive rights for future capital raises
Drag-along and tag-along stock sale rights
Information rights and corporate audit access
Share vesting schedules and founder departures
whenToUse: Use this shareholder agreement when establishing a standard C-Corporation with venture investors or multiple founders.

clauses.heading: C-CORP SHAREHOLDER AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the C-Corp Shareholder Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Board Elections
clauses.body: Shareholders agree to vote to establish a Board of Directors containing {board_seats} seats. Preemptive rights apply to all future rounds of funding.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
